title: Sprint Task Manifest
description: Defines the tasks, dependencies, and metadata for a sprint. Used by the generate-playbook script to produce a deterministic playbook.md.

sprintName.description: Human-readable sprint name (e.g., 'Event Discovery & Social Features').

summary.description: A 2-3 sentence summary of the sprint's goals, features, and business value.

tasks.description: A flat array of all tasks in the sprint. The script uses dependsOn to compute the execution graph.

dependsOn.description: Array of task id strings this task depends on. Empty array means no dependencies (eligible for concurrent execution).

skills.description: Array of skill paths relative to .agents/skills/ (e.g., 'platform/cloudflare-workers').

model.description: The model name string from models.json (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking)').

instructions.description: Detailed, multi-line task instructions. MUST use '\n- ' for bulleted formatting and line breaks to ensure readability. Ignored if isQA, isCodeReview, or isRetro is true.

scope.description: Optional workspace scope hint (e.g., '@repo/api', '@repo/web'). Tasks sharing a scope at the same concurrency layer are grouped into one Chat Session.

isQA.description: If true, the script injects the plan-qa-testing workflow delegation instead of custom instructions.

isCodeReview.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-code-review workflow delegation.

isRetro.description: If true, the script injects the sprint-retro workflow delegation.
